title: Câu Trực Tiếp & Gián Tiếp – Luyện Tập
summary: Tổng hợp bài tập trắc nghiệm câu trực tiếp – gián tiếp từ cơ bản đến nâng cao.

exerciseSets.title: Luyện Tập Câu Trực Tiếp, Gián Tiếp 1 (50 câu)

exercises.question: Julia said that she ___________ there at noon.
exercises.explanation: Động từ tường thuật 'said' ở quá khứ nên 'is going to' lùi thì thành 'was going to'.

exercises.question: He _______ that he was leaving way that afternoon.
exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc 'tell someone that + clause'. Ở đây dùng 'told me' làm tân ngữ cho động từ tường thuật.

exercises.question: She told me _______.

options.text: to think well before I answered
think well before I will answer

exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc 'tell someone to do something' (bảo ai làm gì). Thể phủ định/khẳng định lùi thì phù hợp.

exercises.question: I _________ him to sell that old motorbike.
exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc 'advise someone to do something' (khuyên ai làm gì).

exercises.question: My parents reminded me ________ the flowers.
exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc 'remind someone to do something' (nhắc nhở ai làm gì).

exercises.question: I asked Martha ______ to enter law school.
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp Yes/No dùng 'if + S + V (lùi thì)'.

exercises.question: Nam wanted to know what time ________.
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp Wh-word: 'what time' + S + V (lùi thì từ begins thành began).

exercises.question: I wondered_______ the right thing.
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp: 'whether I was doing' (lùi từ am doing thành was doing).

exercises.question: The scientist said the earth ________ the sun.
exercises.explanation: Sự thật hiển nhiên 'the earth goes around the sun' nên động từ giữ nguyên thì hiện tại đơn.

exercises.question: Peter said that if he ________rich, he _________ a lot.
exercises.explanation: Mệnh đề giả định/câu điều kiện loại 2 'If he were... he would...' giữ nguyên không lùi thì khi chuyển sang câu gián tiếp.

exercises.question: They said that they had been driving through the desert____________.
exercises.explanation: Trong câu gián tiếp, 'yesterday' được chuyển thành 'the previous day'.

exercises.question: He asked the children _________too much noise.
exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc 'ask someone not to do something' (yêu cầu ai không làm gì).

exercises.question: The man said that the days _________longer in summer.
exercises.explanation: Sự thật hiển nhiên 'the days are longer in summer' nên giữ nguyên ở hiện tại đơn.

exercises.question: The teacher said Columbus _________America in 1942.
exercises.explanation: Sự kiện lịch sử xảy ra tại thời điểm xác định trong quá khứ 'in 1942' giữ nguyên thì quá khứ đơn.

exercises.question: John said he _________ her since they ________ school.
exercises.explanation: Kết hợp thì với 'since': S + haven't/hasn't + PII since S + V_ed lùi một thì thành S + hadn't + PII since S + V_ed.

exercises.question: The woman asked __________get lunch at school.
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp: 'whether the children could' (lùi can thành could và đưa chủ ngữ ra trước động từ).

exercises.question: The teacher advised us ______.

options.text: to be careful when doing these exercises
be careful when doing these exercises
are careful when doing these exercises

exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc 'advise someone to do something' (khuyên ai làm gì).

exercises.question: He asked, “Why didn’t she take the final exam?” - He asked why __________ the final exam.
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp Wh-word lùi thì: 'why she hadn't taken' (lùi từ didn't take thành hadn't taken).

exercises.question: “What were you doing last night, Mr John?” asked the police.

options.text: The police asked what were you doing last night, Mr John
The police asked Mr John what he had been doing the night before
The police asked Mr John what he had been done the night before
The police asked Mr John what had he been done the night before

exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp lùi thì: 'Mr John what he had been doing the night before' (lùi từ Mr John what were you doing...).

exercises.question: They told their parents that they___________ their best to do the test.
exercises.explanation: Lùi 'will' thành 'would' trong câu tường thuật.

exercises.question: She asked me where I___________ from.
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp: 'where I came from' (lùi từ come thành came).

exercises.question: She_________ me whether I liked classical music or not.
exercises.explanation: Động từ tường thuật câu hỏi gián tiếp ở quá khứ: 'asked me whether...'.

exercises.question: He asked me who the editor of that book__________
exercises.explanation: Động từ 'is' lùi thành 'was' trong câu hỏi gián tiếp.

exercises.question: He wants to know whether I ___________ back tomorrow .
exercises.explanation: Động từ tường thuật ở hiện tại đơn 'wants to know' nên không lùi thì, chọn 'will come'.

exercises.question: I wonder why he___________ love his family.
exercises.explanation: Động từ tường thuật ở hiện tại đơn 'wonder' nên không lùi thì, giữ nguyên 'doesn't'.

exercises.question: They asked me how many children___________.
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp: 'how many children I had' (chủ ngữ đứng trước động từ lùi thì).

exercises.question: Thu said she had been___________ the day before.
exercises.explanation: Trạng từ chỉ nơi chốn 'here' lùi thành 'there'.

exercises.question: The student said that the English test_______ the most difficult.
exercises.explanation: Động từ 'is' lùi thành 'was' trong câu gián tiếp.

exercises.question: He wanted to know _______ shopping during the previous morning.

options.text: that if we had been going

exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp lùi thì: 'if we had been going' (lùi từ were going thành had been going).

exercises.question: He asked me _______ Robert and I said I did not know _______.

options.text: that did I know / who were Robert
that I knew / who Robert were
if I knew / who Robert was
whether I knew / who was Robert

exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp Yes/No dùng 'if' kết hợp mệnh đề lùi thì và đổi trật tự từ: 'if I knew / who Robert was'.

exercises.question: The mother asked her son _______.
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp lùi thì quá khứ đơn/hiện tại hoàn thành thành quá khứ hoàn thành: 'where he had been'.

exercises.question: Martin asked me _______.
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp: 'how my father was' (chủ ngữ 'my father' đứng trước động từ 'was').

exercises.question: The host asked Peter _______ tea or coffee.
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp lựa chọn: 'whether he preferred' (lùi từ prefer thành preferred).

exercises.question: She asked me _______ my holidays _______.

options.text: where I spent / the previous year
where I had spent / the previous year
where did I spend / last year

exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp lùi thì: 'where I had spent / the previous year' (lùi từ spent thành had spent, last year thành the previous year).

exercises.question: He advised _______ too far.
exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc 'advise someone not to do something' (khuyên ai không làm gì).

exercises.question: John often says he _______ boxing because it _______ a cruel sport.
exercises.explanation: Động từ tường thuật ở hiện tại đơn 'says' nên giữ nguyên không lùi thì: 'does not like / is'.

exercises.question: Nancy asked me why I had not gone to New York the summer _______.
exercises.explanation: Trong câu gián tiếp, 'last summer' đổi thành 'the summer before' hoặc 'the previous summer'.

exercises.question: He asked _______ him some money.
exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc 'ask someone to do something' (yêu cầu ai làm gì).

exercises.question: Andrew told me that they _______ fish two _______ days.
exercises.explanation: Động từ tường thuật 'told' nên lùi thì thành 'had not eaten' và 'two days ago' thành 'two previous days' hoặc 'two days before'.

exercises.question: Jason told me that he _______ his best in the exam the _______ day.
exercises.explanation: Lùi 'will do' thành 'would do', 'tomorrow' thành 'the following day'.

exercises.question: John asked me _______ in English.
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp lùi thì: 'what that word meant' (lùi từ 'mean' thành 'meant').

exercises.question: The mother told her son _______ so impolitely.
exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc 'tell someone not to do something' (bảo ai không cư xử như vậy).

exercises.question: She said she _______ collect it for me after work.
exercises.explanation: Lùi 'will' thành 'would' trong câu tường thuật.

exercises.question: She said I _______ an angel.
exercises.explanation: Lùi 'am/are' thành 'was/were' phù hợp với chủ ngữ 'I'.

exercises.question: I have ever told you he _______ unreliable.
exercises.explanation: Động từ tường thuật ở hiện tại hoàn thành 'have ever told' nên không lùi thì động từ 'is'.

exercises.question: I told him _ the word to Jane somehow that I _ to reach her during the early hours.
exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc 'tell someone to do something' kết hợp mệnh đề lùi thì 'would be trying' (lùi từ will be trying).

exercises.question: Laura said she had worked on the assignment since _______.
exercises.explanation: Trạng từ 'yesterday' lùi thành 'the day before'.

exercises.question: John asked me _______ interested in any kind of sports.
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp Yes/No: 'if I was' (lùi từ am/are thành was/were).

exercises.question: John asked me _______ that film the night before.
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp Yes/No: 'if I had seen' (lùi từ did you see thành had seen).

exercises.question: The guest told the host that _______.
exercises.explanation: Lùi 'must' thành 'had to', 'now' thành 'then' phù hợp với câu gián tiếp.

exerciseSets.title: Luyện Tập Câu Trực Tiếp, Gián Tiếp 2 (50 câu)

exercises.question: “I’ll tell you about this tomorrow, Mary.” said Tom.

options.text: Tom said to Mary that he will tell her about that the next day
Tom told Mary that I would tell you about that the next day
Tom told Mary that he would tell her about that the next day
Tom told Mary that she would tell him about that the next day

exercises.explanation: Lùi 'will' thành 'would', 'tomorrow' thành 'the next day' và đổi đại từ: 'Tom told Mary that he would tell her about that the next day'.

exercises.question: “I have something to tell you” Mary said to John.

options.text: Mary told John I had something to tell him
Mary told John she had something to tell him
Mary told John she had had something to tell him
Mary told John he had had something to tell her

exercises.explanation: Lùi 'have' thành 'had' và đổi đại từ: 'Mary told John she had something to tell him'.

exercises.question: He said, “My wife has just bought a diamond ring.”

options.text: He said that his wife had just bought a diamond ring
He said that my wife had just bought a diamond ring
He said that his wife has just bought a diamond ring
he said that his wife just bought a diamond ring

exercises.explanation: Lùi 'has just bought' thành 'had just bought' và đổi tính từ sở hữu 'my' thành 'his'.

exercises.question: “I will come with you as soon as I am ready”, she said to Philip.

options.text: She said to Philip he will come to see you as soon as he I am ready
She told Philip she will come to see her as soon as she was ready
She told Philip she would come to see you as soon as she was ready
She told Philip she would come to see him as soon as she was ready

exercises.explanation: Lùi 'will come' thành 'would come', 'am' thành 'was' và đổi đại từ phù hợp.

exercises.question: “I wrote to him yesterday”

options.text: She said to me I wrote to him the day before
She told me she wrote to him yesterday
She told me she had written to him yesterday
She told me she had written to him the day before

exercises.explanation: Lùi 'wrote' (quá khứ đơn) thành 'had written' (quá khứ hoàn thành), 'yesterday' thành 'the day before'.

exercises.question: “He is talking to your sister”, She said to me.

options.text: She told me he was talking to your sister
She told me she was talking to my sister
She told me he was talking to my sister
She told me he was talking to her sister

exercises.explanation: Lùi 'is talking' thành 'was talking' và đổi đại từ sở hữu 'your' thành 'my' phù hợp với ngữ cảnh nói với tôi.

exercises.question: “It is the time to check what you have done”, the father said to the boys.

options.text: The father said to the boys it was time to check what they had done
The father told the boys it was time to check what they had done
The father told the boys it was time to check what they have done
The father told the boys it is time to check what they had done

exercises.explanation: Động từ tường thuật ở quá khứ 'said to/told' nên lùi thì 'is' thành 'was', 'have done' thành 'had done'.

exercises.question: “You will like my sister when you meet her”

options.text: He told me you will like her sister when you meet her
He told me I will like his sister when I met her
He told me I would like his sister when I met her
He told me I would be liked his sister when I met her

exercises.explanation: Lùi 'will' thành 'would', 'meet' thành 'met' và đổi đại từ phù hợp.

exercises.question: “I didn’t meet Susan last week”

options.text: He said he didn’t meet Susan the week before
He said he hasn’t met Susan last week
He said he hadn’t met Susan last week
He said he hadn’t met Susan the week before

exercises.explanation: Lùi 'didn't meet' thành 'hadn't met', 'last week' thành 'the week before'.

exercises.question: “I didn’t break your watch”

options.text: The boy told the girl he hadn’t broken her watch
The boy told the girl he didn’t break her watch
The boy asked the girl he hadn’t broken her watch
The boy told the girl he hadn’t broken your watch

exercises.explanation: Lùi 'didn't break' thành 'hadn't broken' và đổi đại từ sở hữu 'your' thành 'her'.

exercises.question: “Could you tell me how to get to the airport?”

options.text: He asked me how to get to the airport
He said if I could tell him the airport
He told me how to get to the airport
He asked me to tell how to get to the airport

exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi yêu cầu gián tiếp: 'He asked me how to get to the airport'.

exercises.question: “Have you heard of her marriage?”

options.text: she asked me if I hear of their marriage
she asked me whether I had heard of their marriage
she asked me if I had heard of their marriage

exercises.explanation: Cả B và C đều đúng khi chuyển câu hỏi Yes/No ở Hiện tại hoàn thành thành câu hỏi gián tiếp dùng 'if' hoặc 'whether'.

exercises.question: Cindy said that “I haven’t seen John since last month.”

options.text: Cindy said she hasn’t seen John since the previous month
Cindy said she hadn’t seen John since the previous month
Cindy said she wasn’t seen John since the previous month
Cindy said she doesn’t see John since the previous month

exercises.explanation: Lùi 'haven't seen' thành 'hadn't seen', 'last month' thành 'the previous month'.

exercises.question: The little boy said “two and two make four.”

options.text: The little boy said that two and two made four
The little boy said that two and two have made four
The little boy said that two and two had made four
The little boy said that two and two make four

exercises.explanation: Quy luật toán lý hóa hoặc sự thật hiển nhiên 'two and two make four' được giữ nguyên thì hiện tại đơn.

exercises.question: “If I were you, I would go to the doctor. ”Minh said to Lan.

options.text: Minh told Lan to become a doctor
Minh advised Lan to go to the doctor
Minh told Lan that he would to go to the doctor
Minh advised Lan not to go to the doctor

exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc khuyên bảo 'If I were you, I would...' chuyển thành cấu trúc 'advise someone to do something'.

exercises.question: His wife said to him: “write to me as often as you can”

options.text: His wife told him to write to her as often as he can
His wife told him to write to her as often as he could
His wife told him writing to her as often as he could
His wife told him writing to her as often as he can

exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc yêu cầu 'tell someone to do something' lùi 'can' thành 'could' trong mệnh đề so sánh.

exercises.question: “What were you doing last night, Mr John?” asked the police.

options.text: The police asked what were you doing last night, Mr John
The police asked Mr John what he had been doing the night before
The police asked Mr John what he had been done the night before
The police asked Mr John what had he been done the night before

exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp lùi thì: 'what he had been doing the night before' (lùi từ what were you doing last night).

exercises.question: My friend asked me who _______________ the piano in the sitting room.
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp: 'who was playing' (lùi 'is playing' thành 'was playing').

exercises.question: The teacher told his students _______________ laughing.
exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc yêu cầu 'tell someone to do something'.

exercises.question: Mary asked me ________________.

options.text: whether I would watch the football match on TV the day before
whether I watched the football match on TV the day before
If I had watch the football match on TV the day before
whether I had watched the football match on TV the day before

exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp Yes/No dùng 'whether + S + had watched' (lùi từ did you watch, last night/day before thành the day before).

exercises.question: “ Why hasn’t Minh phoned? ” she wondered

options.text: she wondered why Minh hasn’t phoned
she wondered why Minh didn’t phone
she wondered why Minh hadn’t phoned
she wondered why hadn’t Minh phoned

exercises.explanation: Lùi 'hasn't phoned' thành 'hadn't phoned' trong câu gián tiếp.

exercises.question: Jennifer asked me where _______________ the week before.
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp lùi thì quá khứ đơn/hiện tại hoàn thành thành quá khứ hoàn thành: 'I had gone'.

exercises.question: Tom asked me ________.

options.text: if was I having a good time last year
whether I had had a good time the year before
if would I have a good time the year before
whether I have had a good time the year before

exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp lùi thì: 'whether I had had a good time the year before' (lùi từ did you have a good time last year).

exercises.question: Do you know where _______?
exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc hỏi thăm thông thường 'Do you know where he lives?' (giữ nguyên trật tự từ trần thuật và không lùi thì khi động từ dẫn 'do you know' ở hiện tại).

exercises.question: She asked me __________ the seat ___________ or not
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp Yes/No bị động: 'whether/if the seat was occupied' (lùi từ is the seat occupied).

exercises.question: The policeman asked us ______________

options.text: had any of us seen the accident happen
Whether any of us had seen the accident happen
If had any of us seen the accident happen
that if any of us had seen the accident happen

exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp Yes/No: 'whether any of us had seen the accident happen'.

exercises.question: I asked him ___________, but he said nothing
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp: 'what the matter was' (chủ ngữ 'the matter' đứng trước động từ 'was').

exercises.question: James___________ him up when the bus reached the square
exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc 'ask someone to do something' (yêu cầu ai làm gì).

exercises.question: Excuse me. Could you tell me___________ ?
exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc hỏi thăm thông thường: 'Excuse me. Could you tell me what time it is?'.

exercises.question: We wondered ___________ from his office after that scandal
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp: 'why he did not resign' (đưa chủ ngữ ra trước trợ động từ lùi thì).

exercises.question: Jeff wanted to know ___________

options.text: that why were his friends laughing
the reason why his friends laughing

exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp: 'why his friends were laughing' (đưa chủ ngữ 'his friends' ra trước động từ).

exercises.question: Mr. Hawk told me that he would give me his answer the ___________ day
exercises.explanation: Trong câu gián tiếp, 'tomorrow' chuyển thành 'the following day' hoặc 'the next day'.

exercises.question: She ___________ him whether he liked the steak she cooked
exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc 'asked someone whether...' (hỏi ai đó xem liệu...).

exercises.question: His neighbors sometimes wondered ___________ he did for a living.
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp Wh-word: 'what he did for a living' (lùi từ what do you do).

exercises.question: Could you please tell me ___________?

options.text: It is how far to the nearest bus stop
how far is it to the nearest bus stop
how far to the nearest bus stop is it
how far it is to the nearest bus stop

exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc gián tiếp: 'how far it is to the nearest bus stop'.

exercises.question: Marigold wondered ___________ Kevin and Ruth would be at the party
exercises.explanation: Cả B (whether) và C (if) đều đúng cho câu hỏi gián tiếp Yes/No.

exercises.question: He asked me___________

options.text: How long I have studied English
How long had I studied English
How long I had study English
How long I had studied English

exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp lùi thì quá khứ hoàn thành: 'how long I had studied English' (lùi từ how long have you studied).

exercises.question: The passengers asked ___________ we landed.
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp Wh-word: 'when' + S + V (lùi thì từ did we land thành we landed).

exercises.question: She asked Nam what ___________ in that room.
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp: 'what he was doing' (lùi từ what are you doing).

exercises.question: “I didn’t take your calculator”, Bob said to Mary .

options.text: Bob told Mary he hadn’t taken her calculator
Bob told Mary I didn’t take your calculator x
Bob told Mary he haven’t taken her calculator
Bob told Mary he had taken her calculator

exercises.explanation: Lùi 'didn't take' thành 'hadn't taken' và đổi đại từ: 'Bob told Mary he hadn't taken her calculator'.

exercises.question: Mrs. Emmanuelle told to Alice to give her a hand.
exercises.explanation: Lỗi sai ở 'told to'. Sửa thành 'told Alice' (bỏ to).

exercises.question: John said the taxi driver to turn left at the first traffic lights.
exercises.explanation: Lỗi sai ở 'said'. Sửa thành 'told' vì có tân ngữ chỉ người 'the taxi driver' phía sau.

exercises.question: Mary ordered John if he could carry her suitcase, please.
exercises.explanation: Lỗi sai ở 'ordered'. Ngữ cảnh là một lời yêu cầu lịch sự dùng 'could you please', nên sửa thành 'asked'.

exercises.question: Johnson Nancy Lee asked me if would I like to have dinner with her.
exercises.explanation: Lỗi sai ở 'would I like'. Sửa thành 'I would like' (đưa chủ ngữ ra trước động từ trong câu gián tiếp).

exercises.question: Hoa asked Lan whether did she like sports or not.
exercises.explanation: Lỗi sai ở 'did she like'. Sửa thành 'she liked' (bỏ trợ động từ did và lùi động từ chính).

exercises.question: Ba told to Tuan if he could ride his bicycle to school.
exercises.explanation: Lỗi sai ở 'told to'. Sửa thành 'told Tuan' (bỏ to).

exercises.question: Phong asked Peter whether he enjoys reading books or not.
exercises.explanation: Lỗi sai ở 'enjoys'. Sửa thành 'enjoyed' vì động từ tường thuật ở quá khứ 'asked' nên phải lùi thì.

exercises.question: Mary promised her boy friend that she would expect to see him next Wednesday.
exercises.explanation: Lỗi sai ở 'next Wednesday'. Sửa thành 'the following Wednesday' trong câu gián tiếp.

exercises.question: A tourist asked how far was it from Ho Chi Minh City to Hue.
exercises.explanation: Lỗi sai ở 'was it'. Sửa thành 'it was' (đưa chủ ngữ ra trước động từ trong câu gián tiếp).

exercises.question: He asked Lan how many people there are in her family.
exercises.explanation: Lỗi sai ở 'there are'. Sửa thành 'there were' vì động từ tường thuật ở quá khứ 'asked' nên phải lùi thì.

exerciseSets.title: Luyện Tập Câu Trực Tiếp, Gián Tiếp 3 (50 câu)

exercises.question: She asked the little boy what ……
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp Wh-word lùi thì: 'what his name was'.

exercises.question: Tom asked Susan if she ……to wear her new hat
exercises.explanation: Lùi 'wants' thành 'wanted' vì động từ tường thuật ở quá khứ 'asked'.

exercises.question: The man asked her if she ….him the time
exercises.explanation: Lùi 'can you tell' thành 'could tell'.

exercises.question: She said that they had moved their house …
exercises.explanation: Trong câu gián tiếp, 'last year' chuyển thành 'the year before' hoặc 'the previous year'.

exercises.question: John’s mother asked where he …the night before
exercises.explanation: Lùi quá khứ đơn 'went' thành quá khứ hoàn thành 'had gone' trong câu gián tiếp.

exercises.question: She asked Mr. Vincent …
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp: 'what his job was' (chủ ngữ 'his job' đứng trước động từ 'was').

exercises.question: She said she …….
exercises.explanation: Lùi 'is a teacher' thành 'was a teacher' khi tường thuật.

exercises.question: She asked me what time …
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp: 'what time it was' (chủ ngữ 'it' đứng trước động từ 'was').

exercises.question: She asks him if he …back next week
exercises.explanation: Động từ tường thuật ở hiện tại đơn 'asks' nên động từ ở mệnh đề sau không lùi thì, giữ nguyên 'is coming' (ở đây chỉ tương lai).

exercises.question: “Come and have dinner with us” he said

options.text: He ordered me to come and have dinner with them
He invited us to come and have dinner with them
He asked me if I would come to their dinner
He wanted to know whether I would come to their dinner

exercises.explanation: Lời mời 'Come and have dinner...' chuyển thành cấu trúc 'invite someone to do something'.

exercises.question: She asked John to repeat what he had said
exercises.explanation: Câu trực tiếp tương ứng là lời yêu cầu lịch sự: 'Please repeat what you've said'.

exercises.question: He asked me ……. I liked rock music
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp Yes/No dùng 'whether + clause' (lùi từ do you like).

exercises.question: When Tom was at Helen’s apartment yesterday, Tom asked if he ...use the phone
exercises.explanation: Lùi 'can I use' thành 'could use' phù hợp với ngữ cảnh quá khứ 'yesterday'.

exercises.question: “Keep away from this area” said the security guard when we approached the fence

options.text: The security guard told to us to keep away from that area when we approached the fence
The security guard told us to keep away from that area when we approached the fence
The security guard said to us to keep away from that area when we approached the fence
The security guard told us to keep away from this area when we approached the fence

exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc 'tell someone to do something' (bảo ai đó làm gì), 'this' đổi thành 'that'.

exercises.question: His uncle asked Tom …the previous match
exercises.explanation: Lùi quá khứ đơn 'won' thành 'won' (vẫn giữ nguyên quá khứ đơn trong nhiều đề trắc nghiệm) hoặc 'had won'. Ở đây đáp án 'won' là chính xác nhất so với các lựa chọn khác.

exercises.question: Their parents wanted to know ………
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp: 'what was happening' (trong câu hỏi chủ ngữ là từ để hỏi 'what' thì giữ nguyên trật tự từ và lùi thì).

exercises.question: “Do you know….? asked the old lady
exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc hỏi thông thường 'Do you know where the ticket office is?' (giữ nguyên trật tự câu trần thuật).

exercises.question: She asked him …again
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp: 'when he would come' (lùi 'will' thành 'would').

exercises.question: “I don’t know ……such a big cake” he said
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp Wh-word lùi thì: 'how she made' (lùi từ 'how did she make').

exercises.question: He said it was time we ……….
exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc 'It's time someone did something' (đã đến lúc làm gì - chia quá khứ giả định).

exercises.question: He asked me what I thought of the film.
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp: 'what I thought' (lùi 'think' thành 'thought').

exercises.question: He said he wished he ……..the answer
exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc 'wish + S + past simple' (ước ở hiện tại - giữ nguyên thì quá khứ 'knew').

exercises.question: Mary says …….to school by bus
exercises.explanation: Động từ tường thuật ở hiện tại 'says' nên mệnh đề sau giữ nguyên không lùi thì 'she goes'.

exercises.question: The man said they ….when it …………snowing
exercises.explanation: Lùi 'will go/stops' thành 'would go/stopped' trong mệnh đề trạng ngữ chỉ thời gian.

exercises.question: She asked him ……from
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp lùi thì: 'where he was' (lùi từ 'where is he').

exercises.question: He wanted to know …to.
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp Wh-word: 'who she was talking' (lùi từ 'who are you talking to').

exercises.question: He asked me if ….on time the day before
exercises.explanation: Lùi 'did you arrive yesterday' (quá khứ đơn) thành quá khứ hoàn thành 'had arrived the day before'.

exercises.question: The man promised that he …to Mary as soon as he reached Paris
exercises.explanation: Lời hứa 'promise to do something' hoặc lùi 'will write' thành 'would write'.

exercises.question: The teacher asked Mary ______ the previous match.
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp lùi thì: 'who won' (lùi từ 'who won' trong quá khứ).

exercises.question: She says she ……….the day after tomorrow
exercises.explanation: Động từ tường thuật ở hiện tại 'says' nên mệnh đề sau giữ nguyên thì tương lai 'will come' khi chuyển 'the day after tomorrow'.

exercises.question: Tom ……..that he’s having a party
exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc 'say that + clause' (Tom nói rằng anh ấy sắp tổ chức tiệc).

exercises.question: Jenny told me that her boyfriend …a restaurant.
exercises.explanation: Lùi 'owns' thành 'owned' khi tường thuật ở quá khứ 'told me'.

exercises.question: Rachel a week ago: I’m taking my driving test tomorrow. You today: When I saw Rachel, she said she was taking her driving test …………..
exercises.explanation: Tường thuật lời nói cách đây 1 tuần, trạng từ 'tomorrow' đổi thành 'the next day'.

exercises.question: Emma two days ago: I’ve only had this new computer since yesterday. You today: Emma said she’d only had the new computer since ……….
exercises.explanation: Tường thuật lời nói cách đây 2 ngày, trạng từ 'yesterday' đổi thành 'the day before'.

exercises.question: Mathew a week ago: I’m meeting a friend at the station later today. You today: Mathew said he was meeting a friend at the station later ………..
exercises.explanation: Tường thuật lời nói cách đây 1 tuần, 'today' đổi thành 'that day'.

exercises.question: What did that man say ………?
exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc 'say something to someone' (nói điều gì với ai).

exercises.question: I rang my friend in America yesterday, and she said it ………..raining there.
exercises.explanation: Lùi 'is' thành 'was' trong câu gián tiếp.

exercises.question: The last time I saw Jonathan, he looked very relaxed. He explained that he’d been on holiday the …week.
exercises.explanation: Mốc thời gian 'last week' được chuyển thành 'the previous week'.

exercises.question: Mathew ……….Emma that her flight was about to take off.
exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc 'remind someone that + clause' (nhắc nhở Emma rằng chuyến bay sắp cất cánh).

exercises.question: “Do not write on the walls” said the teacher to the boys.

options.text: The teacher told the boys do not write on the walls
The teacher told the boys not to write on the walls
The teacher said to the boys not write on the walls
The teacher said to the boys do not write on the walls

exercises.explanation: Mệnh đề mệnh lệnh phủ định chuyển thành 'tell someone not to do something'.

exercises.question: He asked her if she would meet him that evening

options.text: He said to her “Did you meet me that evening"
If he asked her, she’ll meet him this evening
He said “Would you meet me one evening if I asked you?”
He said to her ”Will you meet me this evening”

exercises.explanation: Câu trực tiếp tương ứng là lời đề nghị lịch sự: 'Will you meet me this evening?'.

exercises.question: “Why don’t you buy them this picture as a wedding present, Sarah?”

options.text: Robin suggested Sarah to buy them that picture as a wedding present
Robin suggested that Sarah would buy them that picture as a wedding present
Robin suggested that Sarah buy them that picture as a wedding present
Robin suggested that Sarah will buy them that picture as a wedding present

exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc gợi ý: 'suggest that someone (should) do something' (chia động từ nguyên mẫu không to - subjunctive 'buy').

exercises.question: "I don’t love you any more” said Eric to his girl friend.

options.text: Eric told his girl friend that he any more loved her
Eric told his girl friend that he no longer loved her
Eric told his girl friend that he didn’t love her any more
Both B and C are correct

exercises.explanation: Cả B (no longer loved her) và C (didn't love her any more) đều biểu đạt đúng nghĩa và đúng cấu trúc.

exercises.question: "Bring your swimming things in case it is sunny”

options.text: He told me to bring swimming things if it is sunny
He told me to bring swimming things unless it is raining
He told me to bring swimming things in case it was sunny
He told me to bring swimming things because it was sunny

exercises.explanation: Lùi 'is' thành 'was' trong câu gián tiếp: 'in case it was sunny'.

exercises.question: “I think you shouldn’t go out in this weather” said the man.

options.text: The man advised me don’t go out in the cold weather
The man advised me against going out in that weather
The man advised me not to go out in that weather
The man said I didn’t go out in that weather

exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc khuyên bảo 'advise someone not to do something' hoặc 'advise someone against doing something'. Cả B và C đều đúng ngữ pháp.

exercises.question: "Why don’t you put your luggage under the seat?” he asked

options.text: He suggests that I put my luggage under the seat
He suggested me putting my luggage under the seat
He suggested me to put my luggage under the seat
He suggested that my luggage put under the seat

exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc gợi ý 'suggest that I put my luggage under the seat' (subjunctive).

exercises.question: “Would you like to come round for a drink” he said.

options.text: He asked me would you like to come round for a drink
He asked me if I want to drink
He asked me to come round and drink
He invited me to come round for a drink

exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc lời mời 'Would you like...?' chuyển thành 'invite someone to do something'.

exercises.question: “Don’t swim out too far, boys” I said

options.text: I warned the boys that not to swim too far
I warned the boys not to swim too far
I warned the boys that they shouldn’t swim too far
Both b and c are correct

exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc cảnh báo/ngăn cản 'warn someone not to do something'.

exercises.question: “If the flood gets worse, we must leave the house” he said

options.text: He said that if the flood got worse, they had to leave the house
He said that they will leave the house if the flood gets worse
He said if the flood didn’t become good, they had to leave the house
He said if the flood didn’t get better, they would have to leave the house

exercises.explanation: Lùi các động từ trong câu điều kiện loại 1: 'gets' thành 'got', 'must' thành 'had to'.

exercises.question: “ Would you like to come to my birthday party, Sarah?” asked Frederic.

options.text: Frederic reminded Sarah of his coming birthday party
Frederic invited Sarah to his birthday party
Frederic asked Sarah if she liked his birthday party or not
Frederic asked if Sarah was able to come to his birthday party

exercises.explanation: Lời mời 'Would you like to come...?' chuyển thành 'invite someone to do something' ('Frederic invited Sarah to his birthday party').

exerciseSets.title: Luyện Tập Câu Trực Tiếp, Gián Tiếp 4 (50 câu)

exercises.question: “I’m in a bit of a hurry, but I’ll ring you tomorrow,” William said

options.text: William explained that If he weren’t hurry, he’d ring me tomorrow
William told me that though he was in a bit hurry, but he would ring me the next day
William said he was a bithurry, but he would bring me the following day
William said he was a bit hurry, but he’d ring me the previous day

exercises.explanation: Lùi thì và đổi trạng ngữ phù hợp: 'William told me that though he was in a bit hurry, but he would ring me the next day'.

exercises.question: Johnny asked his father if he could continue with his study overseas.

options.text: “Do you think I can continue with my study overseas.” Said Johnny
“Is it possible for me to study overseas?” Johnny asked his father
“Can I continue with my study overseas?” Johnny said to his father
“Will I continue to study overseas?” Johnny said

exercises.explanation: Câu trực tiếp tương ứng là câu hỏi xin phép: 'Can I continue with my study overseas?'.

exercises.question: “Would you like to have lunch with me on Sunday?” He said to me.

options.text: He invited me to have lunch with him on Sunday
He ordered me to have lunch with him on Sunday
He suggested me to have lunch with him on Sunday
He reminded me to have lunch with him on Sunday

exercises.explanation: Lời mời 'Would you like to have...' chuyển thành 'invite someone to do something'.

exercises.question: He wondered if she lived…………….with her parents.
exercises.explanation: Trạng từ chỉ nơi chốn 'here' đổi thành 'there'.

exercises.question: They wondered………………she would come if it rained.
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp Yes/No dùng 'whether/if + clause'.

exercises.question: He says he…………..at this school in 2000.
exercises.explanation: Động từ 'worked' giữ nguyên hoặc lùi thì khi chỉ mốc thời gian xác định 'in 2000' trong quá khứ.

exercises.question: Victor said he………….very busy.
exercises.explanation: Lùi 'is' thành 'was' trong câu gián tiếp.

exercises.question: I asked Hoa if she……………… Chinese.
exercises.explanation: Lùi 'can' thành 'could' trong câu gián tiếp.

exercises.question: Her friend will come to see her. (She hoped)

options.text: She hoped her friend will come to see her
She hoped her friend would come to see her
She hoped her friend comes to see her
She hoped her friend came to see her

exercises.explanation: Động từ tường thuật ở quá khứ 'hoped' nên mệnh đề sau phải lùi 'will' thành 'would'.

exercises.question: “Buy some meat in the shop,” said my mother to me.

options.text: My mother said to me to buy some meat in the shop
My mother told to me to buy some meat in the shop
My mother told me to buy some meat in the shop
My mother said me to buy some meat in the shop

exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc câu mệnh lệnh gián tiếp: 'tell someone to do something'.

exercises.question: My parents asked if I was going to visit them ………………
exercises.explanation: Trong câu gián tiếp, 'tomorrow' chuyển thành 'the next day' hoặc 'the following day'.

exercises.question: I wanted to know what he…………for her birthday 2 years before .
exercises.explanation: Lùi thì quá khứ đơn thành quá khứ hoàn thành 'had bought' khi có mốc thời gian '2 years before'.

exercises.question: She said she………….come to the party on Friday.
exercises.explanation: Lùi 'can't' thành 'couldn't' trong câu gián tiếp.

exercises.question: Chris asked me where my car…………….
exercises.explanation: Lùi 'is' thành 'was' trong câu hỏi gián tiếp.

exercises.question: Mr Jim said that he……………….happy with his new assistant.
exercises.explanation: Lùi 'isn't' thành 'wasn't' phù hợp với chủ ngữ số ít 'he'.

exercises.question: He said that John……………….up his job.
exercises.explanation: Lùi Hiện tại hoàn thành 'has given' thành Quá khứ hoàn thành 'had given'.

exercises.question: She said that she ……………to learn to drive.
exercises.explanation: Lùi 'is going' thành 'was going' trong câu gián tiếp.

exercises.question: I knew that he……………….a very clever man.
exercises.explanation: Lùi 'is' thành 'was' trong câu gián tiếp.

exercises.question: They said they…………….us if we needed.
exercises.explanation: Lùi 'will help' thành 'would help' trong câu gián tiếp.

exercises.question: She said she…………..the next week, but I never saw her again.
exercises.explanation: Lùi 'will be back' thành 'would be back'.

exercises.question: She said that she……………..there the year before.
exercises.explanation: Lùi 'went/have gone' thành 'had gone' khi có trạng ngữ 'the year before'.

exercises.question: I wonder………………the tickets for the match are on sale yet.
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp Yes/No dùng 'whether' để mở đầu mệnh đề.

exercises.question: She says she……………….the book.
exercises.explanation: Động từ tường thuật ở hiện tại 'says' nên mệnh đề sau giữ nguyên thì hiện tại hoàn thành 'has already found'.

exercises.question: I was sure he…………….the letter.
exercises.explanation: Lùi quá khứ đơn 'posted' thành quá khứ hoàn thành 'had posted' trong câu tường thuật.

exercises.question: He said he…………….to the station to see me off.
exercises.explanation: Lùi 'will come' thành 'would come' trong câu gián tiếp.

exercises.question: The policeman asked George where he……………so early.
exercises.explanation: Lùi 'are you running' thành 'was running' trong câu hỏi gián tiếp.

exercises.question: He says that he……………..the laws of the country.
exercises.explanation: Động từ tường thuật ở hiện tại 'says' nên mệnh đề sau giữ nguyên thì hiện tại đơn 'knows'.

exercises.question: They realized that they…………..their way in the dark.
exercises.explanation: Lùi thì quá khứ đơn 'lost' thành quá khứ hoàn thành 'had lost'.

exercises.question: My friend asked me who……………….the piano in the sitting room.
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp: 'who was playing' (lùi 'is playing' thành 'was playing').

exercises.question: The doctor said to Peter’ “Don’t go for a walk tomorrow”

options.text: the doctor said Peter not to go for a walk the next day
the doctor told Peter not go for a walk the next day
the doctor said to Peter not to go for a walk tomorrow
the doctor told Peter not to go for a walk the next day

exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc mệnh lệnh phủ định: 'tell someone not to do something' và lùi 'tomorrow' thành 'the next day'.

exercises.question: “Don’t forget to clean your teeth,” said Granny to Helen.

options.text: Granny told Helen not forget to clean her teeth
Granny told Helen not to forget to clean her teeth
Granny told Helen to not forget to clean her teeth
Granny said Helen not to forget to clean her teeth

exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc 'tell someone not to forget to do something' (bảo ai đừng quên làm gì).

exercises.question: “Please bring me some chicken soup,” he said to the waitress.

options.text: He asked the waitress bring him some chicken soup
He asked the waitress to bring her some chicken soup
He asked the waitress to bring him some chicken soup
He asked the waitress bring her some chicken soup

exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc yêu cầu lịch sự: 'ask someone to do something' (yêu cầu người bồi bàn mang súp gà cho anh ấy).

exercises.question: “This man spoke to me on the road,” said the woman.

options.text: The woman said that man had spoken to me on the road
The woman said that man has spoken to her on the road
The woman said that man spoke to her on the road
The woman said that man had spoken to her on the road

exercises.explanation: Lùi 'spoke' (quá khứ đơn) thành 'had spoken' (quá khứ hoàn thành) và đổi 'this' thành 'that'..

exercises.question: I said to Peter: “Where are you going?”

options.text: I asked Peter where was he going
I asked Peter where he was going
I asked Peter where is he going
I asked Peter where he is going

exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp: 'asked Peter where he was going' (lùi 'are you going' và đổi trật tự từ).

exercises.question: “If I were you, I’d try to get a room on the top floor,” he said.

options.text: He advised me to try to get a room on the top floor
He advised me to try getting a room on the top floor
He offered me to try to get a room on the top floor
He suggested me to try to get a room on the top floor

exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc khuyên bảo giả định 'If I were you, I'd...' đổi thành 'advise someone to do something'.

exercises.question: “I’ll wait for you if you like,” she said.

options.text: She offered to wait for me
She said she’d wait for me if I liked
She suggested she waited for me

exercises.explanation: Cả A (offer to wait) và B (she'd wait for me if I liked) đều biểu đạt chính xác lời đề nghị giúp đỡ này.

exercises.question: “Remember to switch off when you’ve finished,” he said.

options.text: He reminded me to switch off when I’ve finished
He reminded me to switch off when I’d finished
He offered me to switch off when I’d finished
He suggested me to switch off when I’d finished

exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc nhắc nhở 'remind someone to do something' và lùi thì ở mệnh đề trạng ngữ: 'when I'd finished'.

exercises.question: “You’d better apologise for telling lie,” said my mother.

options.text: My mother advised me to apologise for telling lie
My mother suggested me to apologise for telling lie
My mother suggested apologising for telling lie
My mother warned me to apologise for telling lie

exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc khuyên bảo 'advise someone to do something'.

exercises.question: “Could you check the oil, please?” I asked the mechanic.

options.text: I invited the mechanic to check the oil
I asked the mechanic to check the oil
I reminded the mechanic to check the oil
I warned the mechanic to check the oil

exercises.explanation: Lời yêu cầu lịch sự 'Could you check...' chuyển thành cấu trúc 'ask someone to do something'.

exercises.question: Kate said: “Mike, do you like my dress?”

options.text: Kate asked Mike if he liked her dress
Kate asked Mike if you liked her dress
Kate asked Mike if he liked your dress
Kate asked Mike if he likes her dress

exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp Yes/No lùi thì và đổi đại từ: 'Kate asked Mike if he liked her dress'.

exercises.question: “Will you help me, please? She said. “I can’t reach the top shelf.”

options.text: She asked me help her as she couldn’t reach the top shelf
She asked me to help her as she can’t reach the top shelf
She asked me to help her as she couldn’t reach the top shelf
She warned me to help her as she couldn’t reach the top shelf

exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc yêu cầu giúp đỡ kết hợp lý do lùi thì: 'asked me to help her as she couldn't reach...'.

exercises.question: “This is a horrible room. Why don’t you ask for something better?” he said

options.text: He said it was a horrible room and reminded me to ask for something better
He said it was a horrible room and advised me to ask for something better
He said it was a horrible room and warned me to ask for something better
He said it was a horrible room and invited me to ask for something better

exercises.explanation: Lùi thì và cấu trúc khuyên bảo: 'said it was a horrible room and advised me to ask for something better'.

exercises.question: “Do you know where my shoes are, Mum?” Sharon asked.

options.text: Sharon asked her mother about her shoes
Sharon asked her mother if she knew where her shoes were
Sharon asked her mother for her shoes
Sharon asked her mother if she knew where were her shoes

exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp Yes/No: 'Sharon asked her mother if she knew where her shoes were'.

exercises.question: “I would take the job if I were you” said my classmate.

options.text: My classmate was thinking about taking the job
My classmate introduced the idea of taking the job to me
My classmate advised me to take the job
My classmate insisted on taking the job for me

exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc khuyên bảo 'advise someone to do something'.

exercises.question: “Please don’t mention it to anybody,” Mary said to her friend.

options.text: Mary asked her friend not to mention it to anybody
Mary asked her friend not mention it to anybody
Mary asked her friend to not mention it to anybody
Mary asked her friend did not mention it to anybody

exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc yêu cầu phủ định: 'ask someone not to mention it to anybody'.

exercises.question: Tom said: “ I have already has breakfast, so I am not hungry.’

options.text: Tom said he had already had breakfast, so he is not hungry
Tom said he has already had breakfast, so he is not hungry
Tom said he had already had breakfast, so he was not hungry
Tom told he had already had breakfast, so he was not hungry

exercises.explanation: Lùi tất cả động từ của câu trực tiếp: 'Tom said he had already had breakfast, so he was not hungry'.

exercises.question: I said to Nick: “What are you doing?”

options.text: I asked Nick what was he doing
I asked Nick what he was doing
I asked Nick what is he doing
I asked Nick what he is doing

exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp lùi thì và đổi trật tự từ: 'I asked Nick what he was doing'.

exercises.question: He said to them: “Who will you see before you leave here?”

options.text: He asked them who they would see before they left there
He asked them who would they see before they left there
He asked them who they would see before you left there
He asked them who you would see before they left there

exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp lùi 'will see' thành 'would see', 'leave' thành 'left', 'here' thành 'there'.

exercises.question: She asked me: “Why didn’t you come here yesterday?”

options.text: She asked me why I hadn’t gone there the day before
She asked me why I didn’t go there the day before
She asked me why didn’t I go there the day before
She asked me why hadn’t I gone there the day before

exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp lùi quá khứ đơn 'didn't come' thành quá khứ hoàn thành 'hadn't gone', 'yesterday' thành 'the day before'.

exercises.question: Mother asked me: “Did you play with your friends yesterday?”

options.text: Mother asked me if I had played with my friends the day before
Mother asked me if I played with my friends the day before
Mother asked me if I had played with your friends the day before
Mother asked if you had played with my friends the day before

exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp Yes/No lùi quá khứ đơn thành quá khứ hoàn thành 'if I had played', 'yesterday' thành 'the day before'.

exerciseSets.title: Luyện Tập Câu Trực Tiếp, Gián Tiếp 5 (50 câu)

exercises.question: He……………to go with me to the police station.
exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc 'agree to do something' (đồng ý làm gì).

exercises.question: The man asked us where Piker……………..from.
exercises.explanation: Lùi 'is' thành 'was' trong câu gián tiếp.

exercises.question: He……………me of crashing into his car.
exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc 'accuse someone of doing something' (buộc tội ai làm gì).

exercises.question: He……………me to look for another job.
exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc 'advise someone to do something' (khuyên ai làm gì).

exercises.question: She……………..causing the accident.
exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc 'admit doing something' (thừa nhận đã làm gì).

exercises.question: He said he…………….the next morning.
exercises.explanation: Lùi tương lai đơn 'will leave' thành 'would leave'.

exercises.question: She says she……………….the key.
exercises.explanation: Động từ tường thuật ở hiện tại 'says' nên mệnh đề sau giữ nguyên Hiện tại hoàn thành 'has already found'.

exercises.question: I was sure he……………..the letter the day before.
exercises.explanation: Lùi quá khứ đơn 'posted' thành quá khứ hoàn thành 'had posted' khi có 'the day before'.

exercises.question: You have thanks…………….everything you have done.
exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc 'thank someone for doing something' (cảm ơn ai vì điều gì).

exercises.question: The teacher encouraged Nam……………..harder.
exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc 'encourage someone to do something' (khuyến khích ai làm gì).

exercises.question: I………………..you that you had to be on time.Why are you late?
exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc 'tell someone (that) + clause' có tân ngữ chỉ người đi kèm.

exercises.question: I……………..I would help you, so here I am.
exercises.explanation: Động từ tường thuật quá khứ 'said' kết hợp lùi thì.

exercises.question: When you………………...her if she'd work late, what did she say?
exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc câu hỏi gián tiếp: 'asked her if she'd work late'.

exercises.question: He was made……………….smoking.
exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc bị động của 'make': 'be made to do something' (bị bắt buộc làm gì).

exercises.question: “We’re having a reunion this weekend. Why don’t you come?” John said to us.

options.text: John didn’t understand why we came to a reunion
John asked us why we didn’t come to a reunion this weekend
John simply asked us why we wouldn’t come to a reunion
John invited us to come to a reunion that weekend

exercises.explanation: Lời mời/đề nghị 'Why don't you come?' chuyển thành cấu trúc 'invite someone to do something'.

exercises.question: “Stop smoking or you’ll be ill,” the doctor told me.

options.text: The doctor advised me to give up smoking to avoid illness
I was warned against smoking a lot of cigarettes
The doctor suggested smoking to treat illness
I was ordered not to smoke to recover from illness

exercises.explanation: Lời khuyên 'Stop smoking or...' chuyển thành 'advise someone to do something'.

exercises.question: "Would you like some more beer?" he asked.

options.text: He offered me some more beer
He asked me would I like some more beer
He asked me if I wanted some beer
He wanted to invite me for a glass of beer

exercises.explanation: Lời mời/đề nghị dùng 'Would you like...?' chuyển thành cấu trúc 'offer someone something' hoặc 'offer to do something'.

exercises.question: They said that they…….the new words from three till seven the previous day.
exercises.explanation: Tường thuật hành động đang diễn ra tại một thời điểm xác định trong quá khứ 'from three till seven' lùi thành Quá khứ hoàn thành tiếp diễn 'had been learning'.

exercises.question: “Why don't you go to clubs at the weekend, Mary?” said Jane.

options.text: Jane asked Mary why she doesn't go to clubs at the weekend
Jane invited Mary to go to clubs but Mary refused to go
Jane suggested that Mary should go to clubs at the weekend
Jane wondered why Mary didn't go to clubs at the weekend

exercises.explanation: Lời khuyên/gợi ý 'Why don't you...?' chuyển thành cấu trúc 'suggest that someone should do something'.

exercises.question: The chairman said that the question……………..to vote.
exercises.explanation: Câu bị động gián tiếp lùi thì tương lai: 'would be put'.

exercises.question: "I spoke to Mr.Brown this morning," said Tom.

options.text: Tom said he spoke to Mr. Brown that morning
Tom said he had spoken to Mr.Brown that morning
Tim said I had spoken to Mr. Brown that morning
Tom said he has spoken to Mr. Brown that morning

exercises.explanation: Lùi quá khứ đơn 'spoke' thành quá khứ hoàn thành 'had spoken' và 'this morning' thành 'that morning'.

exercises.question: "John, please buy some milk?", He said

options.text: He reminded John to buy some milk
He ordered John to buy some milk
He told John to buy some milk
He advised John to buy some milk

exercises.explanation: Lời yêu cầu lịch sự 'please buy...' chuyển thành cấu trúc 'tell/ask someone to do something'.

exercises.question: "Do you watch television every evening,Van?" – He asked

options.text: He asked Van if she had watched TV every evening
He asks Van if she watched TV every evening
He asked Van if she watches TV every evening
He asked Van if she watched TV every evening

exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp lùi thì từ hiện tại đơn thành quá khứ đơn: 'asked Van if she watched TV every evening'.

exercises.question: "Go away!" – He said

options.text: He asked me whether I went away
He told me to go away
He advised me to go away
He tells me to go away

exercises.explanation: Mệnh lệnh trực tiếp 'Go away!' chuyển thành 'tell someone to do something'.

exercises.question: "I wish I had learnt French at school,"she told me.

options.text: She told me she wished she had learnt French at school
She told me she wished she learnt French at school
She said to me she wished he learnt French at school
She said me she wished she had learnt French at school

exercises.explanation: Mệnh đề sau 'wish' ở quá khứ hoàn thành 'had learnt' giữ nguyên không lùi thì khi chuyển sang gián tiếp.

exercises.question: "Would you like another biscuit?" he asked me.

options.text: He asks me if I would like another biscuit
He asked me if I would like another biscuit

exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp Yes/No lùi thì: 'asked me if I would like another biscuit'.

exercises.question: "If you like, I'll help you do the decorating, Hung."

options.text: He offered to help Hung do the decorating
He offered Hung a help to do decorating
He asked Hung if Hung needed him to do decorating
He offers to help Hung do the decorating

exercises.explanation: Lời đề nghị 'I'll help you...' chuyển thành cấu trúc 'offer to do something' (đề nghị giúp đỡ).

exercises.question: "No, sorry. I don't want to lend you my car,"he said.

options.text: He refused to lend me his car
He apologized for not lending me my car
he refuses to lend me his car
He refused to lend me his car

exercises.explanation: Lời từ chối 'No, I don't want to...' chuyển thành 'refuse to do something' (từ chối làm gì).

exercises.question: "I really think you should see a doctor, Trang."

options.text: He said Trang should see a doctor
He told Trang to see a doctor
He advised Trang to see a doctor
He advises Trang to see a doctor

exercises.explanation: Lời khuyên 'I really think you should...' chuyển thành 'advise someone to do something'.

exercises.question: "No, it's not true. I didn't steal the money."

options.text: He denied that he stole the money
He said that he didn't steal the money
He denied that he stolen the money

exercises.explanation: Lời phủ nhận 'No, I didn't...' chuyển thành cấu trúc 'deny doing something' (phủ nhận đã làm gì).

exercises.question: Paker:“Help me”

options.text: Paker asked not to help him
Paker advised me to help him
Paker asked us to help him

exercises.explanation: Lời yêu cầu 'Help me' chuyển thành 'ask someone to help someone'.

exercises.question: Carol:“Listen to that song”

options.text: Carol said to listen that song
Carol told us to listen to that song
Carol asked us to listen to this song
Carol talked me to listen to that song

exercises.explanation: Mệnh lệnh 'Listen to...' chuyển thành 'tell someone to listen to something'.

exercises.question: Maria:“Leave me alone!”

options.text: Maria told her friend to leave her alone
Maria told her friend to leave me alone
Maria said her friend to leave me alone
Maria told her friend leaving me alone

exercises.explanation: Mệnh lệnh 'Leave me alone!' chuyển thành 'tell someone to leave her alone' (đổi đại từ me thành her).

exercises.question: Mr Stephens:“Buy me some milk”

options.text: Mr Stephens suggested to buy him some milk
Mr Stephens asked me to buy him some milk
Mr Stephens asked to buy him some milk
Mr Stephens spoke to buy me some milk

exercises.explanation: Mệnh lệnh 'Buy me...' chuyển thành 'ask someone to buy him...'.

exercises.question: George:“Feed the cat”

options.text: George asked his girlfriend to feed the cat
George asked his girlfriend feed the cat
George asked his girlfriend feeding the cat
George asked his girlfriend fed the cat

exercises.explanation: Mệnh lệnh 'Feed...' chuyển thành 'ask someone to feed...'.

exercises.question: Heather: “Don’t say that”

options.text: Heather tells to you not to say that
Heather told you not to say that
Heather advised you to say that
Heather ordered not you to say that

exercises.explanation: Mệnh lệnh phủ định 'Don't say...' chuyển thành 'tell someone not to say that'.

exercises.question: You:“Come with us”

options.text: They told John to come with us
They told to John to come with us
They told John to come with them
They told John came with us

exercises.explanation: Mệnh lệnh 'Come with us' chuyển thành 'tell someone to come with them' (đổi us thành them).

exercises.question: Tom:“ Call me in the evening”

options.text: Tom told us calling him in the evening
Tom told us to called him in the evening
Tom told not us to call him in the evening
Tom told us to call him in the evening

exercises.explanation: Mệnh lệnh 'Call me...' chuyển thành 'tell someone to call him...'.

exercises.question: Your mother:“Come back in one hour”

options.text: My mother told me come back in one hour
My mother asked me come back in one hour
My mother reminded to come back in one hour
My mother told me to come back in one hour

exercises.explanation: Mệnh lệnh chuyển thành 'tell someone to do something'.

exercises.question: Mrs Smith:“Don’t play in front of my windows”

options.text: Mrs Smith told us not to play in front of her windows
Mrs Smith told us not to play in front of my windows
Mrs Smith told us to not play in front of her windows
Mrs Smith said us not to play in front of her windows

exercises.explanation: Mệnh lệnh phủ định chuyển thành 'tell someone not to play...' và đổi 'my' thành 'her'.

exercises.question: Jamei:“Don’t eat so much junk food!”

options.text: Jamei reminded me not to eat so much junk food
Jamei asked me to not eat so much junk food
Jamei reminded me not to ate so much junk food
Jamei says me not to eat so much junk food

exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc nhắc nhở 'remind someone not to do something' (nhắc nhở không ăn nhiều đồ ăn nhanh).

exercises.question: Walter:“Don’t ring Tony on Sunday”

options.text: Walter told me don’t ring Tony on Sunday
Walter told not to ring Tony on Sunday
Walter told me not ring Tony on Sunday
Walter told me not to ring Tony on Sunday

exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc mệnh lệnh phủ định: 'tell someone not to do something'.

exercises.question: Jane:“Don’t watch the new film”

options.text: Jane advised me not to watch the new film
Jane advised not me to watch the new film
Jane advised me do not to watch the new film
Jane advise me not to watch the new film

exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc khuyên bảo 'advise someone not to do something'.

exercises.question: “Don’t make noise because I am listening music now”

options.text: He asked me not to make noise because I am listening music now
He asked me not to make noise because I was listening music then
He asked me not to make noise because he was listening music then
He asked me to make noise because I was listening music then

exercises.explanation: Lùi 'now' thành 'then' và 'am listening' thành 'was listening' kết hợp đổi đại từ 'I' thành 'he' cho phù hợp nghĩa.

exercises.question: Marcel:“Don’t sing this song”

options.text: Marcel asked me not to sing this song
Marcel asked me not to sing that song
Marcel said me not to sing that song
Marcel asked me not to sang that song

exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc mệnh lệnh phủ định kết hợp đổi từ chỉ định 'this' thành 'that'.

exercises.question: Teacher:“Don’t forget your homework”

options.text: Teacher reminded me not to forget my homework
Teacher asked me if not to forget my homework
Teacher reminded whether I not to forget my homework
Teacher reminded me not to forget your homework

exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc nhắc nhở 'remind someone not to forget his/her/my homework'.

exercises.question: John:“Don’t shout at your son”

options.text: John asked me to not shout at my son
John asked me not to shout at my son
John asked me not to shout at your son
John wondered if I do not shout at my son

exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc yêu cầu phủ định 'ask someone not to shout...' và đổi đại từ sở hữu 'your' thành 'my'.

exercises.question: Tom: “ Why don’t you study hard for the coming exam, Ba”

options.text: Tom advised me not to study hard for the coming exam
Tom advised me to study hard for the coming exam
Tom advised Ba not to study hard for the coming exam
Tom advised Ba to study hard for the coming exam

exercises.explanation: Lời khuyên 'Why don't you study hard...' chuyển thành 'advise Ba to study hard...'.

exercises.question: Father:‘Brush your teeth before going to bed, please”

options.text: Father said to his son brushing your teeth before going to bed
Father said to his son to brush his teeth before going to bed
Father told his son to brush my teeth before going to bed
Father told his son to brush his teeth before going to bed

exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc yêu cầu lịch sự: 'tell someone to do something' và đổi tính từ sở hữu 'your' thành 'his'.

exercises.question: The man:“Come in but don’t bring anything”

options.text: The man said to come in but not bring anything
The man told come in but not to bring anything
The man told the boy to come in but not to bring anything
The man asked to come but not to bring anything

exercises.explanation: Hỗn hợp mệnh lệnh khẳng định và phủ định: 'tell someone to come in but not to bring anything'.

exerciseSets.title: Thi Online: Câu Trực Tiếp, Gián Tiếp 1 (30 câu)

exercises.question: Tom said that he __________his motorbike the day before.
exercises.explanation: Lùi quá khứ đơn thành quá khứ hoàn thành 'had lost' khi tường thuật mốc 'the day before'.

exercises.question: She told me that she ______ physiology.
exercises.explanation: Lùi Hiện tại hoàn thành tiếp diễn/Quá khứ tiếp diễn thành Quá khứ hoàn thành tiếp diễn: 'had been studying'.

exercises.question: The doctor has advised ______too much coffee
exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc 'advise someone not to do something' (khuyên ai không nên làm gì).

exercises.question: Angie warned ______anyone what she had told me.
exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc cảnh báo 'warn someone not to do something'.

exercises.question: My mother told me ______my books ______ about on the living room.
exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc yêu cầu phủ định 'tell someone not to leave something + V-ing'.

exercises.question: She wondered ______now, after so many years away.
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp lùi thì và đưa chủ ngữ lên trước động từ: 'what her father looked like' (lùi từ what did her father look like).

exercises.question: He asked me _________ the book I borrowed from the library.
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp Yes/No lùi thì quá khứ đơn thành quá khứ hoàn thành: 'if I had found'.

exercises.question: They said they had come back___________.
exercises.explanation: Trạng từ 'yesterday' lùi thành 'the previous day' trong câu tường thuật.

exercises.question: They asked me___________ in Los Angeles then.

options.text: whether my father had been working

exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp Yes/No lùi thì: 'if my father was working'.

exercises.question: John asked me _______ that film the night before.
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp Yes/No: 'if I had seen' (đổi trật tự từ trần thuật).

exercises.question: He asked his sister _________

options.text: where she would go the following day
where would she go the next day
where will she go the next day

exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp lùi thì: 'where she would go the following day' (lùi từ where will you go tomorrow).

exercises.question: The mother asked her son _____ the day before.
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp lùi thì: 'where he had been' (lùi từ where were you yesterday/day before).

exercises.question: He said he ______ then, but he would get to the party by nine.
exercises.explanation: Lùi thì hiện tại tiếp diễn chỉ tương lai tương ứng với mệnh đề 'would get': 'was going'.

exercises.question: He asked the children ______ too much noise.
exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc câu mệnh lệnh gián tiếp phủ định: 'ask someone not to do something'.

exercises.question: She asked him ……..on an excursion.
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp lùi thì quá khứ đơn thành quá khứ hoàn thành: 'where he had gone' (đáp án B và C giống nhau, đều đúng).

exercises.question: Barbara asked me _______ the homework that week.

options.text: if did she have to do

exercises.explanation: Lùi 'have to' thành 'had to' trong câu hỏi gián tiếp Yes/No: 'if she had to do'.

exercises.question: Daniel asked me if I thought _______.
exercises.explanation: Lùi 'will' thành 'would', 'today' thành 'that day' trong câu hỏi gián tiếp.

exercises.question: The woman asked ____ get lunch at school or not.
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp Yes/No dùng 'whether + S + could'.

exercises.question: Claire wanted to know what time ________
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp Wh-word lùi thì: 'the banks closed' (lùi từ what time do the banks close).

exercises.question: Mary asked me whether I ________ the football match on TV the day before.
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp Yes/No lùi thì: 'whether I had watched' (lùi từ did you watch).

exercises.question: She said that if I ________ back the following day, she ________ able to help me.
exercises.explanation: Lùi thì của câu điều kiện loại 1: 'came - would be' (lùi 'come' thành 'came', 'will be' thành 'would be').

exercises.question: He asked me______ Robert and I did not know_______ .

options.text: that did I know/ who were Robert
that I knew/ who Robert were
if I knew/ who Robert was
whether I knew/ who was Robert

exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp kết hợp Wh-question: 'if I knew/ who Robert was'.

exercises.question: He wanted to know ______ shopping during the previous morning

options.text: that if we had been going

exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp lùi Hiện tại tiếp diễn thành Quá khứ tiếp diễn/Quá khứ hoàn thành tiếp diễn: 'if we had been going'.

exercises.question: Barbara asked me ________ the film “Titanic”.
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp Yes/No lùi thì: 'if I had seen'.

exercises.question: He asked me _____home the day before
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp lùi quá khứ đơn thành quá khứ hoàn thành: 'what time I had left'.

exercises.question: Martin asked me _____________.
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp: 'how my father was' (đưa chủ ngữ lên trước động từ lùi thì).

exercises.question: Kate asked Janet where _____ the previous Sunday.
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp lùi thì quá khứ đơn thành quá khứ hoàn thành: 'she had been'.

exercises.question: The teacher told Joe______________.
exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc mệnh lệnh gián tiếp: 'tell someone to do something'.

exercises.question: Emily said that her teacher ____________ to London___________.
exercises.explanation: Lùi 'will' thành 'would', 'tomorrow' thành 'the next day' trong câu gián tiếp.

exercises.question: She said she _____________.

options.text: was very tired the night before
had been very tired last night
had been very tired the night before

exercises.explanation: Lùi quá khứ đơn 'was tired last night' thành quá khứ hoàn thành 'had been very tired the night before'.

exerciseSets.title: Thi Online: Câu Trực Tiếp, Gián Tiếp 2 (30 câu)

exercises.question: Jenny: “What did your grammar teacher want to talk to you about?” Peter: “I did badly on the last test. She__________ studied for it.”
exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc hỏi thăm gián tiếp lùi thì: 'asked why I hadn't'.

exercises.question: She told the boys ______ on the grass.
exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc mệnh lệnh phủ định: 'tell someone not to do something' (bảo bọn trẻ không chơi trên cỏ).

exercises.question: Jason asked me ___________ him the book the day before.
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp lùi thì quá khứ hoàn thành: 'who had given'.

exercises.question: He said that Linda and John _______ married _______.
exercises.explanation: Lùi 'are getting married tomorrow' thành 'were getting married the next day'.

exercises.question: Tim asked Sarah _____________ English so far.

options.text: how long she has been learning
she had been learning how long
how long she had been learning

exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp lùi thì hiện tại hoàn thành tiếp diễn thành quá khứ hoàn thành tiếp diễn: 'how long she had been learning'.

exercises.question: Jack asked Jil___________interested in any kinds of sports.
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp Yes/No: 'if she was' (lùi is thành was, đưa chủ ngữ lên trước động từ).

exercises.question: He wanted to know whose car I had borrowed _________
exercises.explanation: Trạng từ 'last night' lùi thành 'the previous night'.

exercises.question: Lucie asked me _____ a big doll for her on birthday the day before
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp lùi thì và đưa chủ ngữ ra trước động từ: 'why I had not bought'.

exercises.question: “Where have you been hiding?” She asked. She asked me where_____ hiding.
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp lùi thì quá khứ tiếp diễn/hiện tại hoàn thành tiếp diễn thành quá khứ hoàn thành tiếp diễn: 'I had been'.

exercises.question: "I didn't do it," she said. She __________ doing it.
exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc phủ nhận: 'deny doing something' (phủ nhận đã làm gì).

exercises.question: "Have dinner with me," she said. She _______ me to have dinner with her.
exercises.explanation: Lời mời lịch sự 'Have dinner...' chuyển thành 'invite someone to do something'.

exercises.question: "Why don't you buy this one?" said Sam. Sam _________ I should buy one.
exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc gợi ý 'suggest (that) S + should + V' hoặc 'suggest doing something'.

exercises.question: "I promise I'll take you to Palestine," said Mary. Mary __________ to take me to Palestine.
exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc hứa hẹn 'promise to do something' (hứa sẽ đưa tôi đến Palestine).

exercises.question: "Please, please don't tell anyone!" Asmaa said. Asmaa ___________ me not to tell anyone.
exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc cầu xin 'beg someone not to do something' (van xin tôi đừng nói với ai).

exercises.question: "I won't do it," he said. He _________ to do it.
exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc từ chối 'refuse to do something' (từ chối làm gì).

exercises.question: She said to me that she __________ to me the Sunday before.
exercises.explanation: Lùi quá khứ đơn 'wrote' thành quá khứ hoàn thành 'had written' đi kèm trạng ngữ 'the Sunday before'.

exercises.question: I said that I had met her.................
exercises.explanation: Trong câu gián tiếp, 'yesterday' đổi thành 'the previous day' hoặc 'the day before'.

exercises.question: The man asked the boys..........
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp lùi thì quá khứ tiếp diễn: 'why they were fighting'.

exercises.question: Peter said he was leaving for Paris....................
exercises.explanation: Trong câu gián tiếp, 'next week' đổi thành 'the following week'.

exercises.question: I asked Imane ________________
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp: 'what the time was' (đưa chủ ngữ lên trước động từ lùi thì).

exercises.question: She said that ________________________ she would complete the report the next day.

options.text: she will complete the report next day
she would complete the report next day
she will complete the report tomorrow

exercises.explanation: Lùi 'will complete tomorrow' thành 'would complete the next day' (A, C đều đúng tùy thuộc cách viết trạng ngữ, C chuẩn ngữ pháp nhất).

exercises.question: I told Mounir and Fayssal ______________________
exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc mệnh lệnh phủ định: 'tell someone not to do that'.

exercises.question: He asked Zineb _________________________
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp: 'what her name was' (lùi is thành was và đưa chủ ngữ lên trước).

exercises.question: I warned Farouq ______________________
exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc cảnh báo phủ định 'warn someone not to do something'.

exercises.question: I asked her ________________ she wanted to marry Badr
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp Yes/No dùng 'if' kết hợp mệnh đề trần thuật lùi thì: 'if she was sure'.

exercises.question: He said _________________ if she accepted.

options.text: he is going to marry her

exercises.explanation: Lùi câu điều kiện loại 1 thành loại 2: 'he would marry her if she accepted' (lùi marry thành would marry, accept thành accepted).

exercises.question: Joan asked _______________
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp dùng 'whether' lùi 'can' thành 'could': 'whether he could smoke'.

exercises.question: My teacher reminded me _________ my essay carefully before handing it in
exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc nhắc nhở 'remind someone to do something' (nhắc nhở kiểm tra lại bài luận).

exercises.question: The last time I saw Jonathan, he looked very relaxed. He explained that he'd been on holiday __________
exercises.explanation: Mốc thời gian 'last week' được chuyển thành 'the previous week'.

exercises.question: When I rang Tessa some time last week, she said she was busy _____ day.
exercises.explanation: Mốc thời gian 'this day' được chuyển thành 'that day' trong câu gián tiếp.
